title: AlertNotification
description: Payload delivered by the alert evaluator to every notification channel adapter (and verbatim to generic-webhook channels). Finalized by INT-01 for wave-1 freeze.

alert_id.description: Unique firing instance ID. The same alert_id appears in both the 'firing' and 'resolved' events for a rule evaluation cycle, enabling correlation.

rule_id.description: ID of the AlertRule that triggered

state.description: Current state of this alert instance

ts.description: Unix epoch ms — when this state transition was detected

title.description: Human-readable one-liner, e.g. 'Stream auction-main rebuffer ratio high'

metric.description: Metric that triggered, using normalized internal names (e.g. rebuffer_ratio, bitrate_kbps, viewer_count). These names align with the server-event field naming (gap #6 fix).

value.description: Observed metric value at trigger time

scope.description: Scope identifies which stream/app/node triggered the alert. Field names align with normalized ServerEvent fields (node_id, app, stream_id — not raw AMS names).

cooldown_until.description: Unix epoch ms until which re-firing is suppressed. Present when the evaluator sets a cooldown on this rule instance; null otherwise.

group_key.description: Grouping key value for this firing instance (e.g. the stream_id value when group_by=stream_id). Null when the rule has no group_by.

test.description: True when this notification is a test-fire triggered via POST /alerts/channels/{channelId}/test. Channel adapters should mark test notifications visually.

dashboard_url.description: Deep link to the relevant dashboard page (URI)

expected.description: Anomaly rules: baseline mean (expected value). Used in place of threshold for anomaly notifications.

sigma_multiplier.description: Anomaly rules: configured sigma threshold that was breached.
